title: Pick & Go!
description: Pick & Go! is an engaging pathfinding game set in serene meadows. Your objective is to collect fruits strategically while utilizing tools such as scissors to clear your path and eliminate pesky bugs. With a whopping 200 levels to explore, challenge yourself to earn all three stars in each one! Tileset image from Fruits image from Background Music from
instructions: Mouse Drag or Touch Drag to move character
